response.justification: Bogdan possesses well over a decade of highly relevant full-stack experience, directly aligning with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and advanced requirements like AI-agent infrastructure. His deep background in software testing, system architecture, and developer tooling makes him an exceptional fit for building reliable enterprise engineering tools.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP).
Exceptional background in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though highly experienced in equivalent frameworks.
Heavy historical focus on niche languages like DLang might indicate a preference for non-standard stacks.
Long history of concurrent founder/side-projects (GISCollective) could potentially divide focus.
